{{CargoRelic
|name=Hubble Telescope
|rank=S
|affct=TECH
|birthday=06-15
|source=Fragment Crafting (17.8%), Lottery Machine (0.80%), Relic Forge (90 Relic RF), Super Treasure Maps (15%), Wishing (0.65%)
|description=On Jun 15, 1993, the Hubble Telescope captured the first HD image of the universe. On this day, humans finally caught a glimpse of the universe for the first time. An error of about 2.2 microns, equivalent to one-fifth of a hair, caused Hubble's focus to blur. Later, astronauts launched to repair it via the space shuttle Endeavour.

[Basic info]

Mirror stats: 13.2 meters in total, the maximum diameter is 4.2 meters

Mirrors: 2.4-meter primary mirror and 0.3-meter secondary mirror totally weigh 10 tons

Image: average 20791x19201 pixels

Orbit: 547km from the ground

Speed: 27300 km/h, 163500 orbits

Service: Since 1990
|fame=56
|art=53
|fth=64
|civ=60
|tech=99
|ss1=Angel Gene Research SPD +0.6%<br>Free Gene Speedup (Angel) +6m<br>Per 5 Angel Gene LVLs, Snail RUSH +2<br>Angel Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150
|ss2=Angel Gene Research SPD +1.2%<br>Free Gene Speedup (Angel) +12m<br>Per 5 Angel Gene LVLs, Snail RUSH +4<br>Angel Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150
|ss3=Angel Gene Research SPD +1.8%<br>Free Gene Speedup (Angel) +18m<br>Per 5 Angel Gene LVLs, Snail RUSH +6<br>Angel Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150
|ss4=Angel Gene Research SPD +3%<br>Free Gene Speedup (Angel) +30m<br>Per 5 Angel Gene LVLs, Snail RUSH +10<br>Angel Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150
|ss5=Angel Gene Research SPD +4.2%<br>Free Gene Speedup (Angel) +42m<br>Per 5 Angel Gene LVLs, Snail RUSH +14<br>Angel Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150
|ss6=Angel Gene Research SPD +6%<br>Free Gene Speedup (Angel) +1h<br>Per 5 Angel Gene LVLs, Snail RUSH +20<br>Angel Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150
|ss7=Angel Gene Research SPD +6%<br>Free Gene Speedup (Angel) +1h<br>Per 5 Angel Gene LVLs, Snail RUSH +20<br>Angel Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150<br>Free Gene Speedup (Angel) +1h (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Timemachine skill III.png|50x50px]]Place in Time Machine: This Relic's TECH +15
|skill2=[[File:Compass skill III.png|50x50px]]Place on Exploration Compass: In any Realm, 2x Green Card Drops +15%
|skill3=[[File:Murika skill III.png|50x50px]]Place in Murikan Musuem: In Murika, Angel Cells gained +30%
|mirage={{#invoke:snailDB|parseMirage|{{PAGENAME}}}}
}}

[[Category:Angel Gene Speedup Boost]]
[[Category:Angel Gene Boost]]
[[Category:RUSH Boost]]
[[Category:Time Machine Skill]]
[[Category:TECH Boost]]
[[Category:Exploration Compass Boost]]
[[Category:Exploration Card Drop Boost]]
[[Category:Murika Museum Boost]]
[[Category:Murika Exploration Boost]]
[[Category:Angel Cell Drop Boost]]
[[Category:Fissure Boost]]
[[Category:DEF Boost]]
[[Category:Divine Dragon Descents Boost]]
[[Category:Wood Golem Boost]]
